UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile in the Chuchot platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The email address of the user.

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the user registered.

TrainingProgram.title: TrainingProgram
TrainingProgram.description: Represents a training program offered on the Chuchot platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TrainingProgram entity.

title.description: The title of the training program.

description.description: A detailed description of the training program.

startDate.description: The start date of the training program.

endDate.description: The end date of the training program.

Instructor.title: Instructor
Instructor.description: Represents an instructor who conducts training programs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Instructor entity.

bio.description: A short biography of the instructor.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the instructor's profile picture.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a question submitted by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Question entity.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the question was submitted.

viewCount.description: The number of views for the question.

Answer.title: Answer
Answer.description: Represents an answer to a question.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Answer entity.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the answer was submitted.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores information about training programs. Instructor ID is used to manage ownership.

params.name: trainingProgramId
params.description: The unique identifier of the training program.

params.name: instructorId
params.description: The unique identifier of the instructor.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the question.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the question.

params.name: answerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the answer.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the Chuchot platform's features, including user profiles, training programs, instructors, and a question/answer system. It prioritizes authorization independence and supports secure list operations (QAPs). User profiles are stored in a path-based structure (`/users/{userId}`) for private data. Training programs and instructors are managed under a dedicated collection (`/trainingPrograms` and `/instructors`). Questions and Answers, which are anonymous, are stored under the `/questions` collection, and answers as a subcollection of questions (`/questions/{questionId}/answers`).

Authorization Independence is achieved by storing UserProfile under `/users/{userId}`, enforcing path-based ownership, so rules can easily rely on `request.auth.uid`. Training programs are created by instructors, however, the instructorId is enough to query and list training programs. The security rule will rely on `request.auth.uid` matching the instructorId on create/update requests.

The structure supports QAPs (Rules are not Filters) by segregating data based on ownership and access needs. Path-based ownership for user profiles ensures that only the authenticated user can access their profile data. The membership map model is not used here, as there is no collaborative data requirements.
